short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $1.84B in FY2026 Q1, +24.2% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $2.10B (+14.1% vs current Q) — set by 25 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $2.30 vs current $3.56.
Margin context: 65.4% net margin (78.2% op margin) — expansion likely.
Next earnings: 2026-08-06 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is constructive — consensus is achievable based on current run-rate.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $6B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $8B → FY2 $10B (+23.5% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 25.0% — average operating profile over the long-cycle view.
7-quarter run-rate CAGR: +42.8% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
Sector thesis (Communication Services): Ad spending normalization + AI-driven engagement reshaping the long-run growth profile.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if growth durability + margin expansion both hold.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · positioning window)
bullets: Price $478.82 vs SMA200 $533.01 (-10.2%) — long-term trend is in **downtrend**.

90-day return: +21.8% — positive intermediate-term momentum.
long_term.takeaway: Long-term positioning: wait for a trend-confirmation breakout / breakdown before sizing up.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 84.3% — extreme (binary-event hedging implied).
Put/Call OI: 0.90 — balanced flow.
30-day implied move: ±17.3% ($396.17 – $561.47) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: +8.07pp — put skew (downside hedges bid).
Front-month OI cluster: $500.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Iron condor 30 DTE: short $455 put / short $503 call (wings 5% wide). Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling with capped risk both sides.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 71.4% across 9 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 9 dates spanning 93–940 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±36.4% ($304.49 – $653.15).
393-day implied move: ±74.2% ($123.62 – $834.02) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $520 (+8.6% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-13.0pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $431 put / short $527 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
